## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX teams to discuss ongoing projects and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog cannibalization issue identified; team to replace underperforming content and set up redirects](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Flosum seeking recommendations for homepage improvements and user experience enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide analysis and suggestions for homepage optimization within 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Discussion on highlighting case studies and leveraging differentiators in Flosum's marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)

## Topics

### Blog Content Optimization

  - [Identified potential cannibalization between two Salesforce data governance blogs](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Existing blog (published March) underperforming with only 29 views in 90 days](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [New blog content more in-depth and likely to rank better](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Decision: Replace existing content with new blog and set up URL redirect](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Action: GrowthX to update blog copy and provide redirect links via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### Homepage and UX Improvements

  - [Beau (Flosum) seeking recommendations for homepage enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Current issues: Lack of clear user guidance and significant traffic drop-off](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Jakub (GrowthX) offered to provide analysis and suggestions within 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - Focus areas:
      - [Identifying conversion paths and goals](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [Analyzing successful pages and user behavior](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [Suggesting incremental improvements vs. full redesign](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Beau interested in quick wins, such as dynamic hero section or product previews](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

### Case Studies and Differentiators

  - [Discussion on highlighting case studies in logo parade section](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Consideration of UX impact if not all logos have associated case studies](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Emphasis on showcasing Flosum's differentiators (e.g., security, government clients)](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Example shared: Deel's approach to highlighting reviews and security features](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Suggestion to create targeted messaging for different roles within potential client companies](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

### Conversion Analysis Follow-up

  - [CTA recommendations from previous analysis not yet implemented due to ongoing website projects](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Jakub still awaiting blog landing page conversion data from Beau](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to update blog content and send redirect information via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Beau to provide GrowthX with information on high-converting pages and desired user paths](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Jakub to analyze homepage and provide improvement recommendations in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Team to revisit homepage optimization discussion in October meeting](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [Beau to continue focus on company-wide engagement metrics for sales teams](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
